title: Glass Candle Cylinder Holders – Set of 3 Pillar Candle Vases – Assorted Heights for Home Décor, Weddings & Centerpieces – Crystal Clear Glass Candle Jars – M&W
features: ✔️ CANDLE CYLINDERS - The Maison & White Glass Candle Cylinders are an assorted set of three meaning you can sit the holders together or place them in different rooms. These cylinders are a beautiful way of displaying pillar candles around your home.

✔️ CLEAR GLASS - All three of these candle holders are made from crystal clear, heavy-duty, soda-lime glass so that they are strong, durable and no attention is taken away from your candles, these holders are the perfect complimentary accessory.

✔️ FLOATING CANDLES - If you’re looking for a stylish alternative to pillar candles, you can fill the cylinders with water and set floating candles on top giving the aesthetic look of the candles floating.
✔️ SIZE - Assorted set of 3. Small - 19cm. Medium - 23cm. Large - 27cm. 8.3cm diameter.
✔️ 2-YEAR WARRANTY - The Maison & White Glass Candle Cylinders comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
description: Product Description Glass Candle Cylinders - Set of 3 Illuminating our homes with candles creates a warm and cosy atmosphere, but it’s the finer details such as how the candles are presented that can help finish it off. The assorted set of 3 Maison & White Glass Candle Cylinders is crystal clear decorative pieces that do exactly that. The strong soda-lime glass that all three cylinders are made from providing a comfortable and safe storage place for your lit candle whilst keeping your candles at the centre of attention. As these cylinders are of different size and are a set of 3, you can sit them next to each other on your dining room table or you can place them separately around your home, the choice is yours. Key Features: ✔️ CLEAR GLASS All three of these candle holders are made from crystal clear, heavy-duty, soda-lime glass so that they are strong, durable and no attention is taken away from your candles, these holders are the perfect complimentary accessory. To remove any left-over candle wax, you can rub these cylinders with a slightly damp paper-towel or cloth. ✔️ CANDLE CYLINDERS The Maison & White Glass Candle Cylinders are an assorted set of three meaning you can sit the holders together or place them in different rooms. The different sizes are beneficial for if you have a few different sized pillar candles or if a current pillar candle has lost its height due to burning, you can now display that candle in a smaller cylinder. These cylinders are a beautiful way of displaying pillar candles around your home. ✔️ FLOATING CANDLES If you’re looking for a stylish alternative to pillar candles, you can fill the cylinders with water and set floating candles on top giving the aesthetic look of the candles floating. Specification Size Small - 19cm, Medium - 23cm, Large - 27cm (8.3cm Diameter) Material Soda-lime Glass In the Box 3 x Glass Candle Cylinders All Product Images 2020 Maison & White (Xbite Ltd)
